analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of workos.com/docs covered 1,399 pages (100% crawl coverage) across a single-product topology. 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links were identified, all within user-facing docs (0 repository links). API reference coverage is complete at 100% (217 API pages detected). Example code reliability is estimated at 75.07%, and freshness metadata (last updated dates) is present on 71.38% of pages. Overall audit confidence is 80.39%, with link verification confidence at 67.22% due to 5 unverified URLs blocked by authentication or rate limiting.
strengths: Complete API reference coverage at 100% with 217 API pages successfully detected
Full crawl coverage achieved (100%) with 1,399 pages indexed from 1,402 discovered
Zero broken repository navigation links; all 13 broken links are in user-facing documentation
Strong overall audit confidence at 80.39% with high crawl confidence at 95%
Freshness metadata present on over 71% of pages, enabling content aging analysis
risks: 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation and trust
Example code reliability at 75.07% indicates approximately 1 in 4 code samples may be outdated or non-functional
5 links remain unverified due to authentication, rate limiting, or server blocks, creating blind spots
Link verification confidence at 67.22% suggests potential for undetected link issues
28.62% of pages lack freshness metadata, obscuring content age for nearly one-third of documentation
SEO/geo issue rate at 2.86% may impact discoverability in certain markets or search contexts
No detection limitations flagged, but confidence gaps indicate incomplete validation coverage

prioritized_actions.action: Repair all 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Audit and update code examples to improve reliability from 75.07% toward 90%+ target
Investigate and resolve 5 unverified links (authentication/rate-limit blocks) to eliminate blind spots
Add last-updated metadata to remaining 28.62% of pages for complete freshness tracking
Address SEO/geo issues (2.86% of pages) to optimize search discoverability and regional access

limitations: External audit cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or alignment with actual API/product behavior
Code example reliability is estimated through heuristics; actual runtime validation requires environment-specific testing
5 URLs blocked by authentication or rate limiting could not be verified; internal manual review required
Audit cannot assess documentation completeness, conceptual gaps, or user comprehension effectiveness
Link verification confidence at 67.22% indicates some links may require internal network access or credentials for full validation
